Fireboy and Watergirl Temple

Share:

About Fireboy and Watergirl Temple

Control two heroes at once through element-themed temple puzzles. Great in co-op!

How to Play

Player 1: arrows. Player 2: WASD.

Adventure co-op 2player platformer
